_comment: Recovery-ladder scenarios (issue #17 post-audit amendment): invalid JSON args, unknown tool name, and a schema mismatch. Each raw call is routed through the real parseToolArgs ladder so the mock exercises the SAME validation the live providers use. Truncated-stream mid-call is covered separately by the provider SSE tests.

turns.text: Calling a tool with broken JSON.
Calling a tool that does not exist.
Calling a real tool but missing a required field.
